path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 33 - Dragon Quest (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\1. Adventure - DRAGON QUEST III.mp3
description: I didn't know about Dragon Quest that when the NES game way back when, the composer had already created whole-ass orchestra versions and recorded them, and the 8-bit music was actually based off of them. The composer was nuts for classical music and that's why the whole series sounds the same. This particular tune is kind of a bop.
title: Adventure
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 33: Dragon Quest
original-game: DRAGON QUEST III: The Seeds of Salvation

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 33 - Dragon Quest (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\2. Fighting Spirits - DRAGON QUEST III.mp3
description: It's alright, especially considering this was made and recorded in 1988. It's a short loop though.
title: Fighting Spirits
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 33: Dragon Quest
original-game: DRAGON QUEST III: The Seeds of Salvation

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 33 - Dragon Quest (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\5. Marching Through the Fields.mp3

title: War Cry
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 33: Dragon Quest
original-game: DRAGON QUEST VIII: Journey of the Cursed King

filename: 7. The Hero Goes Forth with a Determination.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 33 - Dragon Quest (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\7. The Hero Goes Forth with a Determination.mp3
description: This brings back bad memories from playing the first 10 hours of DQ11S for science and having to this listen to this constantly over and over. It's not too bad of a song in and of itself, but it's like the only music that plays anywhere. And it's plain! There's not too much meat on the bones! I gave up the game because of the lack of vibes.
title: The Hero Goes Forth with a Determination
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 33: Dragon Quest
original-game: DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 33 - Dragon Quest (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\8. Unflinchable Courage.mp3
description: At least this particular battle theme doesn't have a super short loop. There's some stuff happening. But I don't think I'll ever truly enjoy it. In this arrangement more than most I feel like the instruments sound particularly shit.
title: Unflinchable Courage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 33: Dragon Quest
original-game: DRAGON QUEST XI S: Echoes of an Elusive Age
